faq1_question: How do I cancel my booking?
faq1_answer: You can cancel your booking from the My Bookings section in your account. Select the booking and click on Cancel.
faq2_question: When will I receive my refund?
faq2_answer: Refunds are usually processed within 5–7 business days after cancellation.
faq3_question: Can I change my service provider?
faq3_answer: Yes, you can request a change before the service starts.
faq4_answer: Cancellation fees may apply depending on timing.
stillNeedHelp: Still Need help? Our team is available 24/7
bookingIssueQuestion: Why is my booking not confirmed?
bookingIssueDesc: Your booking may not be confirmed due to:
bookingIssueFooter: Please check your booking status in My Bookings.
bookingIssueQuestion2: My payment was deducted but booking not confirmed. What should I do?
bookingIssueDesc2: If payment is deducted and booking is not confirmed:
reason2_1: The amount will be automatically refunded within 3–7 working days.
reason2_2: Please contact customer support with your transaction ID.
bookingIssueQuestion3: How can I check my booking status?
bookingIssueQuestion4: Can I modify my booking after confirmation?
bookingModifyDesc: Yes, you can modify your booking before the service start time (subject to provider availability).
bookingModifyPath: Go to My Bookings → Select Booking → Modify.
